title: HolidayCheck Hotels Scraper
description: Extract hotel listings from HolidayCheck destination hotel URLs. The actor supports direct hotel listing URLs as well as destination pages that link to hotel listings.

urls.title: HolidayCheck URLs
urls.description: One or more HolidayCheck listing or destination URLs.

results_wanted.title: Maximum results
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of hotels to return across all URLs.

max_pages.title: Maximum pages per URL
max_pages.description: Safety cap for HolidayCheck pagination. Each page contains up to 12 hotels.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy configuration for higher reliability.
